last_packet.summary: Added a fail-closed external eval adapter readiness plan for BFCL, Inspect AI, lm-evaluation-harness, and SWE-bench, with CLI and validation support for governance summaries.

verification.command: python3 -m py_compile flightrecorder/external_eval.py flightrecorder/eval_summary.py flightrecorder/cli.py flightrecorder/validation.py tests/test_external_eval_plan.py tests/test_eval_summary.py
python3 -m unittest tests.test_external_eval_plan tests.test_eval_summary tests.test_compare_rl_export tests.test_compare_gate tests.test_validation

risks: This packet adds fail-closed readiness contracts and validation, not actual BFCL/Inspect AI/lm-evaluation-harness/SWE-bench runner execution.
External dependencies are optional and may be absent locally; plans remain blocked until dependencies, held-out manifests, model endpoints, and adapter-specific inputs are supplied.
The system /usr/bin/python3 is Python 3.9 and previously could not run the full suite because tests/test_deployment_hardening.py imports tomllib; /opt/homebrew/bin/python3 passed the full suite.
